# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  parameters {
    string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: 'registry.example.com', description: 'Docker registry host (and optional namespace), e.g. registry.example.com/team')
    string(name: 'IMAGE_NAME', defaultValue: 'my-app', description: 'Docker image name, e.g. my-app')
    string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: 'latest', description: 'Docker image tag, e.g. 1.2.3')
    string(name: 'DOCKERFILE', defaultValue: 'Dockerfile', description: 'Path to Dockerfile')
    string(name: 'BUILD_CONTEXT', defaultValue: '.', description: 'Docker build context directory')
    string(name: 'BUILD_ARGS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional docker build args, e.g. --build-arg KEY=VALUE --build-arg FOO=bar')
    booleanParam(name: 'PUSH_IMAGE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Push image to registry')
  }

  environment {
    FULL_IMAGE = "${params.REGISTRY_URL}/${params.IMAGE_NAME}:${params.IMAGE_TAG}"
  }

  stages {
    stage('Checkout') {
      steps {
        checkout scm
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      steps {
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Building: ${FULL_IMAGE}"
          docker build -f "${DOCKERFILE}" ${BUILD_ARGS} -t "${FULL_IMAGE}" "${BUILD_CONTEXT}"
        '''
      }
    }

    stage('Push') {
      when {
        expression { return params.PUSH_IMAGE }
      }
      steps {
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Pushing: ${FULL_IMAGE}"
          docker push "${FULL_IMAGE}"
        '''
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      sh '''
        set +e
        docker image inspect "${FULL_IMAGE}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker image rm -f "${FULL_IMAGE}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
      '''
    }
  }
}
